goal: Make missing or pending Builder WebSocket configuration visible in the GOAT Desktop popup so the product no longer appears inert when no Builder cue stream is configured.
claims: Missing GOAT_BUILDER_WS_URL and/or GOAT_BUILDER_TOKEN shows a visible waiting status
Configured Builder WebSocket startup shows a connecting status before the async bridge reports connected or reconnecting
No Builder cue, Stage 1, Stage 2, Stage 3, or Stage 4 permission is expanded
dod: Popup status tests cover missing URL, missing token, and missing both
Connection chip maps waiting status to a plain user state
